prompt_config.style: Ultra-realistic photography - time travel tourism documentation
prompt_config.theme: Late Cretaceous Period - Hell Creek Formation (~66 million years ago)
prompt_config.photography_style: Hyper-realistic travel photography, as if captured by time travelers

main_prompt: Ultra-realistic photograph captured by time travelers visiting the Late Cretaceous Period Hell Creek Formation 66 million years ago, 16:9 format, absolutely photorealistic quality as if shot with professional modern camera, massive Tyrannosaurus Rex with incredibly detailed thick scaly skin texture hunting near riverbank, Triceratops herd with hyper-realistic bone texture on frills and horns grazing on prehistoric ferns, every scale wrinkle and skin fold visible in extreme detail, ground covered entirely with realistic ferns instead of grass, ancient Araucaria conifer trees with detailed bark texture, humid subtropical atmosphere with realistic heat haze and atmospheric perspective, natural lighting showing real-world physics, professional DSLR camera shot with perfect focus and natural depth of field, museum diorama level realism but fully alive and breathing, scientifically accurate dinosaur anatomy with realistic skin, muscle movement visible under hide, authentic Late Cretaceous ecosystem, no fantasy elements, pure documentary reality as if these creatures exist today, 8K ultra-sharp photorealistic detail, time travel vacation photography aesthetic, every element looks tangibly real and photographable

ultra_realism_approach.photography_concept: Images look like actual photographs taken by tourists on a time travel vacation to the Cretaceous, not CGI or illustrations
ultra_realism_approach.realism_level: Hyper-realistic to the point where viewer questions if this is real, museum quality brought to life
ultra_realism_approach.texture_detail: Every surface has realistic texture - dinosaur skin with pores, wrinkles, scars, dirt; plants with realistic leaves, bark, mud with actual particulate detail
ultra_realism_approach.lighting_physics: Real-world natural lighting with accurate shadows, subsurface scattering on skin, realistic atmospheric scattering
ultra_realism_approach.life_authenticity: Dinosaurs look like living breathing animals with realistic eyes (moist, reflective), nostril moisture, slight muscle movement
ultra_realism_approach.environmental_reality: Mud looks wet and heavy, water has realistic surface tension, dust particles visible in air, everything feels tangible

time_period_specifics.geological_period: Late Cretaceous Period, Maastrichtian Age, Hell Creek Formation
time_period_specifics.years_ago: 66 million years ago, final days before K-Pg extinction
time_period_specifics.climate: Subtropical greenhouse climate, humid, warm, realistic heat shimmer
time_period_specifics.tourism_context: Time travel agency clients experiencing authentic Cretaceous wildlife safari, vacation photography style

dinosaur_species_realistic.tyrannosaurus_rex: Hyper-realistic T-Rex with every anatomical detail accurate, thick scaly skin with visible individual scales each catching light differently, realistic skin texture like modern crocodiles or Komodo dragons but adapted to size, lips covering teeth creating realistic closed-mouth appearance (modern scientific accuracy), possible subtle downy proto-feathers on back rendered realistically, eyes with realistic cornea shine and pupil dilation, nostril moisture visible, realistic muscle definition visible under thick hide, powerful legs with realistic joint articulation, tiny arms with functional claws, battle scars and healed wounds showing real animal life history, brown-grey-olive earth tone coloration with realistic pigmentation patterns, male may have colorful display crest rendered with realistic keratin texture, 12-13 meters long with realistic weight and mass appearance
dinosaur_species_realistic.triceratops: Ultra-realistic Triceratops with incredibly detailed bone texture on massive frill, realistic keratin covering showing weathering and scratches from life, three horns with realistic growth rings and wear patterns, thick hide with realistic elephant-like skin texture in some areas and armored scales in others, realistic eyes showing herbivore awareness, realistic beak with worn keratin edge from constant feeding, tank-like body with realistic weight distribution and muscle bulk, 8-9 meters long, realistic earth-tone coloration (brown, grey, tan) with possible vibrant display colors on frill rendered realistically like modern bird wattles, realistic dirt and mud on lower body from wallowing
dinosaur_species_realistic.quetzalcoatlus: Hyper-realistic giant azhdarchid pterosaur with detailed leathery wing membrane showing realistic blood vessels and skin texture, realistic fur-like pycnofibers on body, long toothless beak with realistic keratin sheath, realistic eye with reptilian or avian character, giraffe-sized height when standing creating realistic scale, realistic joint articulation in wings and legs, 10-11 meter wingspan with realistic membrane tension, grey-brown realistic coloration
dinosaur_species_realistic.edmontosaurus: Ultra-realistic hadrosaur with detailed scaly skin texture, broad duck-like beak with realistic keratin and wear, realistic eyes showing herd animal awareness, 12-13 meter length with realistic bulk, peaceful grazing behavior captured naturally, brown-beige realistic coloration with subtle patterns, visible muscle movement under skin as it moves and feeds, realistic dirt on feet and lower legs
dinosaur_species_realistic.realistic_behavior: All dinosaurs captured in realistic natural behavior - feeding, walking, resting, interacting - nothing posed or theatrical, looking like wild animals documented on safari

prehistoric_vegetation_realistic.ground_cover: NO GRASS - completely absent as scientifically accurate, ground entirely covered with hyper-realistic ferns with every frond rendered in detail showing realistic leaf texture, venation, and natural variations, some ferns damaged or eaten showing realistic plant damage, realistic moss patches, muddy areas with realistic soil texture and moisture
prehistoric_vegetation_realistic.trees_ultra_detailed: Ancient Araucaria (monkey puzzle) conifers with incredibly detailed realistic bark texture showing age, weathering, and realistic growth patterns, realistic needle clusters, ancient pines with realistic rough bark and sap evidence, Cycads with realistic palm-like appearance but scientifically accurate for period, thick realistic trunk texture, early flowering Magnolia trees with realistic bark, realistic large waxy leaves, and realistic white or pink flowers with visible stamens and realistic petal texture
prehistoric_vegetation_realistic.forest_floor: Realistic forest floor with fallen logs showing realistic decay and fungal growth, realistic leaf litter, realistic mud with actual texture and moisture levels, realistic rocks with lichen and weathering, realistic water puddles with surface tension and reflections
prehistoric_vegetation_realistic.landscape_realism: Mix of realistic dense subtropical forest with realistic light filtering through canopy, realistic open floodplains covered in ferns, realistic muddy riverbanks with actual sediment layers visible, realistic atmospheric haze and distance showing true atmospheric perspective
prehistoric_vegetation_realistic.plant_life_quality: Every plant looks like it could be touched, picked up, examined - completely photorealistic botanical accuracy with realistic growth patterns, realistic damage from herbivory, realistic variations in individual plants

climate_atmosphere_realistic.weather_conditions: Realistic subtropical to tropical climate with tangible humidity, realistic heat haze rising from ground in distance showing true atmospheric refraction, realistic warm air visible as gentle distortion
climate_atmosphere_realistic.atmospheric_effects: Realistic atmospheric perspective with correct color shift and detail loss at distance, realistic volumetric atmosphere with light scattering, possible realistic mist in valleys showing actual water vapor behavior, realistic cloud formations appropriate to subtropical climate
climate_atmosphere_realistic.lighting_natural: Natural sunlight with realistic color temperature, realistic shadows with correct penumbra and umbra, realistic light filtering through humid atmosphere, realistic golden hour if at dawn/dusk with accurate color shifts, realistic midday harsh light if appropriate, all lighting following real-world physics
climate_atmosphere_realistic.environmental_details: Realistic dust or pollen particles visible in light shafts, realistic water droplets on leaves from humidity, realistic steam rising from warm surfaces, realistic volcanic haze in far distance showing geological activity, everything behaves according to real physical laws

color_palette_realistic.natural_coloration: Realistic earth-tone palette based on modern animal coloration principles - forest greens (realistic plant chlorophyll colors), earthy browns (realistic soil and bark), slate greys (realistic reptilian skin tones), realistic muddy siennas and umbers
color_palette_realistic.dinosaur_colors: Scientifically plausible realistic coloration - base colors of brown, grey, olive, tan for large animals (realistic camouflage and thermoregulation), vibrant but realistic accent colors (reds, oranges, blues, yellows) on display features like crests and frills rendered like modern bird or reptile display colors (realistic iridescence, realistic pigment cells, realistic keratin coloration), no fantasy neon colors, all coloration looks like it exists in nature today
color_palette_realistic.vegetation_colors: Realistic prehistoric plant colors - darker blue-greens typical of ancient plants, realistic brown bark tones with grey weathering, realistic flower colors (white, pink, cream) with natural petal translucency
color_palette_realistic.atmospheric_colors: Realistic sky colors - realistic blue sky with correct atmospheric scattering, realistic golden hour colors (warm peachy pinks, soft lavenders, golden ambers) following actual atmospheric optics, realistic subtle volcanic ash tint if present creating realistic grey-blue distance
color_palette_realistic.realistic_variation: No color is perfectly uniform - realistic variation and mottling in dinosaur skin, realistic color variation in plants, realistic dirt and staining on animals from environmental interaction

camera_technical_realistic.camera_simulation: Shot appears to be taken with professional modern DSLR or mirrorless camera (Canon EOS R5, Nikon Z9, Sony A1 equivalent), realistic camera characteristics
camera_technical_realistic.lens_characteristics: Natural lens rendering - realistic depth of field from f/2.8-f/8 aperture depending on subject distance, realistic bokeh with natural falloff, realistic lens sharpness with slight realistic edge softness if wide angle, realistic compression if telephoto, no unrealistic distortion
camera_technical_realistic.focus_realistic: Realistic autofocus with main subject tack sharp showing perfect modern lens resolution, realistic focus falloff creating natural depth separation, possibly realistic foreground or background elements slightly soft showing real camera behavior
camera_technical_realistic.exposure_natural: Realistic exposure showing natural dynamic range, realistic highlight rolloff, realistic shadow detail retention, exposed like professional wildlife photography with perfect histogram, no unrealistic HDR tone-mapping
camera_technical_realistic.ISO_and_grain: Clean modern sensor quality typical of 8K capture, minimal noise in good light, slight realistic grain structure if lower light conditions, no artificial smoothing, natural photographic texture
camera_technical_realistic.shutter_speed_realism: Motion captured realistically - frozen action if fast shutter showing perfect stillness or slight realistic motion blur if capturing movement (dinosaur walking, tail swaying), realistic ripples in water showing actual fluid dynamics
camera_technical_realistic.image_quality: 8K photorealistic resolution, every detail sharp where in focus as if actually photographed, realistic micro-contrast and detail rendition, looks like uncompressed RAW file processed by professional

composition_realistic.photography_style: Composed like actual wildlife travel photography - rule of thirds, realistic framing leaving breathing room, natural subject placement, not perfectly centered unless intentional, realistic horizon placement
composition_realistic.foreground_elements: Realistic foreground with actual depth - perhaps realistic fern fronds creating natural frame, realistic ground showing actual 3D space, everything looks like real physical objects at specific distances
composition_realistic.subject_placement: Dinosaurs positioned naturally in environment showing realistic scale and spatial relationships, captured like wildlife photographer found them naturally, not posed
composition_realistic.background_depth: Realistic background with true atmospheric perspective, background elements showing realistic detail loss and color shift with distance, realistic sky or forest creating natural backdrop
composition_realistic.environmental_context: Composition shows dinosaurs in realistic habitat context - riverbank, forest edge, fern prairie - environment looks like actual real place that exists, not constructed or artificial

time_travel_tourism_aesthetic.vacation_photography: Image feels like it was captured by time travel agency client on luxury prehistoric safari, professional but not overly artistic, documentary travel photography style
time_travel_tourism_aesthetic.authentic_moment: Captured moment feels authentic and unscripted - dinosaurs doing natural behaviors, environment looking completely real, as if photographer was actually present in Cretaceous
time_travel_tourism_aesthetic.tour_guide_approved: Scientifically accurate enough for time travel agency educational materials, realistic enough to show potential clients what they would actually see
time_travel_tourism_aesthetic.aspirational_realism: Makes viewer believe they could actually visit this place and see these exact scenes, looks like real destination photography
time_travel_tourism_aesthetic.safety_distance: Shot from realistic safe distance showing respect for dangerous megafauna, telephoto composition if near predators, appropriate tourism photography distance

negative_prompt: CGI look, rendered appearance, video game graphics, obvious 3D render, fake plastic texture, artificial smoothness, cartoon style, illustrated look, painting appearance, drawn elements, fantasy colors, neon colors, unrealistic saturation, modern animals, humans visible, contemporary elements, anachronistic dinosaurs, Jurassic species (Stegosaurus, Brachiosaurus), teeth showing when mouth closed (outdated), excessive feathers, grass on ground, modern plants, buildings, vehicles, modern technology, low resolution, blurry low quality, poor textures, uncanny valley, artificial lighting, studio lighting, unrealistic shadows, lens flares, HDR artifacts, over-processed look, filters, digital painting, concept art style, toy-like appearance, smooth featureless skin, incorrect anatomy, mixed time periods, flat 2D appearance, lack of depth, artificial bokeh, fake depth of field

recommended_settings.detail_emphasis: Extreme texture detail on skin, plants, environment

complete_prompt_string: Ultra-realistic photograph captured by time travelers visiting Late Cretaceous Period Hell Creek Formation 66 million years ago, 16:9 format, absolutely photorealistic quality as if shot with professional modern DSLR camera (Canon EOS R5 or Nikon Z9 quality), massive Tyrannosaurus Rex with incredibly detailed thick scaly skin texture every individual scale visible catching light differently, realistic lips covering teeth (modern scientific accuracy), possible subtle realistic downy proto-feathers on back, realistic eyes with cornea shine and moisture, nostril moisture visible, realistic muscle definition under thick hide, battle scars showing real life history, brown-grey-olive earth tone realistic coloration, 12-13 meters creating realistic sense of massive scale, hunting or walking near realistic muddy riverbank, Triceratops herd with hyper-realistic bone texture on massive frills showing realistic weathering and scratches, three horns with realistic growth rings, thick hide with realistic elephant-like texture, realistic eyes, realistic beak with worn keratin, tank-like body with realistic weight, 8-9 meters, realistic earth tones with possible vibrant display colors on frill rendered like modern bird wattles, realistic mud on lower body, grazing on prehistoric ferns, ground completely covered with hyper-realistic ferns with every frond detailed showing realistic leaf texture and venation, NO GRASS scientifically accurate, ancient Araucaria conifer trees with incredibly detailed realistic bark texture, realistic needle clusters, Cycads with realistic trunk texture, early Magnolia trees with realistic bark and realistic white/pink flowers with visible stamens, realistic forest floor with fallen logs showing decay, realistic leaf litter, realistic mud with actual texture, humid subtropical atmosphere with realistic heat haze rising showing atmospheric refraction, realistic atmospheric perspective, natural sunlight with realistic color temperature and shadows following real physics, realistic dust particles in light, realistic water droplets on leaves, professional wildlife photography depth of field with main subjects tack sharp and realistic background softness, 8K ultra-sharp photorealistic detail, museum diorama quality but fully alive and breathing, scientifically accurate Hell Creek ecosystem, authentic Late Cretaceous fauna behavior captured naturally like real wildlife safari, time travel vacation photography aesthetic, every element looks tangibly real and photographable as if this moment actually exists, no CGI or rendered appearance, pure photographic reality

alternative_prompts.option_1_trex_closeup: Ultra-realistic photograph, 16:9, T-Rex close-up shot with hyper-detailed scaly skin texture every scale visible, realistic eyes with moisture, lips covering teeth, realistic muscle definition, brown-grey earth tones, fern prairie background, natural sunlight, professional DSLR quality, realistic depth of field, 8K photorealistic, time travel safari photo, scientifically accurate anatomy, looks like actual photograph of living breathing animal
alternative_prompts.option_2_herd_scene: Photorealistic image, 16:9, Edmontosaurus herd grazing on realistic fern-covered ground with hyper-detailed plant textures, ancient Araucaria forest backdrop with realistic bark detail, Quetzalcoatlus pterosaur with realistic leathery wings overhead, humid subtropical atmosphere with realistic heat haze, natural lighting, DSLR camera quality with realistic DOF, Hell Creek Formation accuracy, 8K ultra-realistic, time travel tourism photography
alternative_prompts.option_3_landscape_realism: Ultra-realistic photograph, 16:9, prehistoric landscape with Triceratops at realistic muddy riverbank showing detailed mud texture, T-Rex silhouette in distance with realistic atmospheric haze, lush vegetation with NO GRASS only realistic ferns and ancient trees, volcanic peaks on horizon with subtle realistic haze, natural warm lighting, professional travel photography, realistic depth and atmospheric perspective, 8K photorealistic detail, authentic Cretaceous ecosystem as if actually photographed

usage_notes.for_midjourney: Use complete_prompt_string with --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 6 --q 2, emphasize 'photorealistic' and 'actual photograph' heavily
usage_notes.for_stable_diffusion: Use photorealistic models (SDXL Realism, RealVisXL), include detailed_elements for texture guidance, negative prompt is crucial for avoiding CGI look
usage_notes.for_dalle: DALL-E 3 with complete_prompt_string, emphasize 'photograph' and 'camera' repeatedly to trigger photorealistic mode
realism_tips: Emphasize 'photograph' and 'camera' terms to avoid illustration/CGI look
Stress texture detail and individual surface characteristics
Mention specific camera models for realistic rendering
Include realistic imperfections (scars, wear, dirt, variation)
Specify realistic lighting physics and atmospheric effects
Use negative prompt aggressively to prevent rendered CGI appearance
